name: Modular Patch-Level Image Obfuscation Framework
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && if [ -s /root/.claude/.credentials.json ]; then echo '--- Host Claude credentials detected. Installing Claude Code... ---' && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && echo '--- Claude Code ready. Uses your host credentials from ~/.claude. ---'; else echo '--- No host Claude credentials found. Skipping Claude Code install. ---'; fi
